LanguageData.SL_RaidOriginLeaderInfo: Base Leader {0} decided to join this raid, if you can capture or kill them - all future raids from this base will be weakened.
LanguageData.SL_SiteOwnershipInfo: Base {0} has claimed ownership of this site.
LanguageData.SL_JumpToBaseDesc: Jump to the base that owns this site.
LanguageData.SL_ActingLeaderChosen: The acting {LEADERTITLE} is {PAWN_nameDef} until a new leader is chosen.
LanguageData.SL_PowerVoidEndedLetterLabel: {FACTION_name} has come out of a Power Void.
LanguageData.SL_NewLeaderElectedLetterBody: {PAWN_nameDef} has been selected as the new faction leader.
LanguageData.SL_RiotingSuccess: Rioting at {0} succeeded. {PAWN_nameDef} is the new leader.
LanguageData.SL_RiotingFailed: Rioting at {0} has failed. The current leader remains in power.
LanguageData.SL_PrisonersDetected: High value prisoners detected in the area.
LanguageData.SL_ReinforcementsCalledBody: {0} has called for reinforcements. They will arrive in {1}.
LanguageData.SL_SanctionedCannotTrade: Cannot trade with this faction. They are sanctioned.
LanguageData.SL_DistanceWeightDesc: Controls how strongly a faction's proximity to your colony influences its chance of performing raids. At 0%, distance does not matter.
